source_summary: Finance users can export finalized invoices to CSV for a required date range of up to 31 days, including empty-result exports with headers.
assumptions: The export action is initiated by an authenticated finance manager.
out_of_scope: PDF exports and invoice approval workflows

covered_behaviors: Successful CSV export for finalized invoices
Header-only export when no rows match
gaps: The required CSV column order is not specified.

acceptance_criteria.title: Export finalized invoices within an allowed date range
acceptance_criteria.setup: Finalized invoices exist between the selected start date and end date, and the range spans 31 days or fewer
acceptance_criteria.action: The finance manager exports invoices as CSV
acceptance_criteria.expected_outcome: The system returns a CSV containing only finalized invoices that fall within the selected range

acceptance_criteria.title: Require both start and end dates
acceptance_criteria.setup: The finance manager opens the invoice export flow without a complete date range
acceptance_criteria.action: The finance manager submits the export request
acceptance_criteria.expected_outcome: The system rejects the request and explains that both start and end dates are required

acceptance_criteria.title: Reject date ranges longer than 31 days
acceptance_criteria.setup: The finance manager selects a start date and end date that are more than 31 days apart
acceptance_criteria.action: The finance manager submits the export request
acceptance_criteria.expected_outcome: The system rejects the request and explains that the maximum export range is 31 days

acceptance_criteria.title: Return a header-only file when no finalized invoices match
acceptance_criteria.setup: No finalized invoices exist in the selected date range
acceptance_criteria.action: The finance manager exports invoices as CSV
acceptance_criteria.expected_outcome: The system returns a CSV file containing headers only and no invoice rows
